title: Make a Security Camera System in 30 Minutes or Less
description: Turn a Jetson and a spare webcam into a motion-detecting home surveillance system using free software and a Docker container.

title: Capture Fast-Moving Objects with a Global Shutter Camera
description: Use the Onsemi AR0234CS global shutter camera module at up to 120 FPS on a Jetson Nano to capture fast motion without blur.

title: Getting Started with the Jetson Xavier NX Developer Kit
description: A first-boot walkthrough for the Jetson Xavier NX: flashing JetPack, headless setup, and running your first AI demo.

title: Safety Helmet Detection System with YOLOv7
description: Train a 3-class safety helmet detector and deploy it on a Jetson board with YOLOv7 accelerated by TensorRT.

title: TinyML FOMO: Rice Variety Detection with Edge Impulse
description: Real-time detection of rice seed varieties using Edge Impulse's FOMO machine-vision model running on constrained hardware.

title: Object Tracking on myCobot 280 Jetson Nano
description: Control a 6-DOF robotic arm with object detection and tracking using OpenCV on the Jetson-powered myCobot 280.

title: LiDAR Integration with ROS 2 Foxy
description: Bring up an RPLiDAR on a Jetson with ROS 2 Foxy inside a Docker container and visualize the scan data.

title: Building a Map using LiDAR with ROS Melodic and Hector SLAM
description: Install ROS Melodic on a Jetson Nano and build a 2D occupancy map of a room using an RPLiDAR and Hector SLAM.

title: Rescue Bot: Autonomous Disaster-Response Rover
description: A skid-steer ground rover that navigates rough terrain, maps with LiDAR, fuses IMU and wheel odometry, and reads environmental gas sensors. Uses ROS for autonomous navigation.

title: Running a ChatGPT-like LLM (LLaMA2) on a Jetson Cluster
description: Stand up a small Jetson cluster and run a LLaMA2 large language model for local, private ChatGPT-style inference.

title: Image Captioning for the Visually Impaired
description: An accessibility device that captions the scene in front of a camera and reads it aloud for blind and visually impaired users.

title: Fire Detector using Omniverse Replicator and Arduino Nicla
description: A proof-of-concept TinyML fire detector trained on a synthetic dataset generated with NVIDIA Omniverse Replicator.

title: Face Mask Detection with PyTorch and TensorRT
description: Train a face mask detector and deploy it on a Jetson board using PyTorch for training and TensorRT for fast inference.

title: GigglyGram: Generative AI Meme Companion
description: Uses generative AI on a Jetson to turn you into a witty conversationalist with clever comebacks and memes.

title: Handwriting Recognition with an IMU Pen
description: An IMU-equipped pen trained to recognize handwritten digits from motion data using a small neural network.

title: BrowZen: Emotion-Aware Web Insights
description: Correlates your facial emotional states with the websites you visit to give you actionable insights about your screen time.

title: ShAIdes: AI-Enabled Smart Glasses
description: Wearable AI glasses that act as a transparent UI for the real world, letting you effect change in your surroundings with gestures.

title: Doom Air: Play Doom with Your Body
description: Use pose estimation on a Jetson to play Doom on a giant screen using your body as the game controller.

title: Artemis: Object and Person Locator Glasses
description: An eyeglass-mounted device that locates a specific object or person and then tracks it, announcing position to the wearer.

title: The Nvidianator: AI Animatronic Skull
description: A Halloween animatronic skull that uses object detection on a Jetson to track and react to people who walk by.

title: Audio-Visual Face Mask Detection (Headless JupyterLab)
description: A multimodal mask-recognition system that combines audio and video, run headlessly on the Jetson Nano via JupyterLab.

title: Tipper: Real-Time Baseball Strike-Zone Predictor
description: Predicts in real time whether a pitch will land inside or outside the strike zone using high-speed vision on a Jetson.

title: The Jetson Sisters: Assistant Robots
description: A prototype robot assistant built on the Jetson Nano that incorporates deep-learning vision and speech tools.

title: AI-Driven Interactive Lab Assistant (OpenCV + ChatGPT)
description: Provides auto-generated lessons and guidance on lab equipment using object detection plus a conversational LLM for remote learning.
